name: nprogress
when_to_use: 不确定时长的整页/路由/fetch 加载指示(YouTube/GitHub 那条顶部细条)时用它;整视图/路由级用它,组件内联转圈用 ldrs。进度由你在异步生命周期里调 start()/set(0..1)/inc()/done() 驱动,条与 trickle 归 nprogress。
why_valuable: 让未知时长加载显得'活着'的 trickle+缓动很难复刻;AI 手搓出静态或线性填充的假条。nprogress 是自足、零依赖的事实标准。

data_in.note: nprogress 是命令式:没有数据数组,靠 start()/set(0..1)/inc()/done() 驱动;configure 给外观与 trickle 参数。parent 是选择器,对 document 生效(条会落到 document.body)。

configure?.minimum?: number 0..1 —— 起始最小进度,默认 0.08
configure?.trickle?: boolean —— 未知时长自动缓增,默认 true
configure?.trickleSpeed?: number —— trickle 间隔 ms,默认 800
configure?.speed?: number —— 条动画时长 ms,默认 200
configure?.showSpinner?: boolean —— 右上角转圈,默认 true
configure?.parent?: string —— 挂载容器选择器(document 域),默认 'body'

schema._lifecycle: start() 开始 · set(n) 设定 0..1 · inc() 递增 · done() 收尾到 100%

example._why: 无数据数组,示例即 configure 外观 + 生命周期约定。

uplink: 纯 display,无 uplink;进度值由消费 AI 从自身异步进度调 set()/inc()/done() 单向下发。

carriers.widget: conditional:条渲染进 document.querySelector(parent)(默认 body)、CSS 须落 document 域,是页面级 fixed overlay,无法 shadow 内收敛(零足迹例外)
carriers.codex: supported:default export + 外链 CSS,无 worker/wasm

isolation.evidence: API correct: +esm default export(q as default)= NProgress 对象,方法 configure/start/set/inc/done;Settings.parent='body',document.querySelector(i.parent) 后 appendChild → #nprogress 条挂进 document.body(document 域,逃逸 shadow)。默认已实测:minimum .08、speed 200、trickleSpeed 800、trickle true、showSpinner true、easing 'ease'。globalStyleInjection=no:库不注入任何 CSS —— nprogress.css(asset 200)须由消费方在 document 域引入。globalDomMutation=yes:向 document.querySelector(parent) append #nprogress。globalEvents=no:grep 到 0 处 window/document addEventListener。shadowCompatible=conditional:本质是页面顶部 fixed 条,非 shadow 内收敛。

en.when_to_use: Use it for indeterminate whole-page, route, or fetch loading indicators, the thin top bar used by YouTube/GitHub. Use it for whole-view or route-level loading and ldrs for an inline component spinner. Drive progress from the async lifecycle with start()/set(0..1)/inc()/done(); nprogress owns the bar and trickle behavior.
en.why_valuable: The trickle plus easing that makes unknown-duration loading feel alive is hard to reproduce; AI-written versions are usually static or linear fake bars. nprogress is the self-contained, dependency-free de facto standard.

data_in.note: nprogress is imperative: it has no data array and is driven by start()/set(0..1)/inc()/done(); configure controls appearance and trickle parameters. parent is a selector in the document scope, and the bar is inserted into document.body by default.

configure?.trickle?: boolean -- Automatically increase during indeterminate work; default true
configure?.trickleSpeed?: number -- Trickle interval in ms; default 800
configure?.speed?: number -- Bar animation duration in ms; default 200
configure?.parent?: string -- Mount-container selector in document scope; default 'body'

schema._lifecycle: start() begins; set(n) sets 0..1; inc() increments; done() finishes at 100%
